---
title: Introduction
image: "images/profile_icon.png"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20em
  links: 
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/paul-grieve-b806051ba/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/paulhetgrieve
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: Email
      href: mailto:pgrieve@student.ubc.ca
---

Hello all! 
My name is Paul and I have worked in ecological restoration and resource management since completing my undergraduate in 2020 from the University of Victoria. Through working for a variety of non-profits, land trusts, and governmental organizations, I have become well versed in field work, geospatial data manipulation and analysis, visualizing results, and effectively communicating results to diverse stakeholders.

---

In my free time, I love to hike – bike – kayak – canoe or anything that gets me outside! On a rainy day, you will catch me reading a book, drinking ten different varieties of tea, and fixing an overdue DIY project.

---

Feel free to reach out via LinkedIn, GitHub , or email!

Yours frondly,

Paul


![Sir Donald in Glacier National Park](images/sirdonald.jpg)
